message.content:
@startuml
participant "ユーザ" as User
participant "店舗一覧ページ" as StorePage
participant "商品一覧ページ" as ProductPage
participant "商品DB" as ProductDB

User -> StorePage : 1. 店舗選択
StorePage -> ProductPage : 2. 遷移
ProductPage -> ProductDB : 3. 店舗IDで商品検索
ProductDB -> ProductPage : 4. 検索結果
ProductPage -> User : 5. 表示

@enduml
